title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 9-A.  EMERGENCY INTERIM JUDICIAL SUCCESSION

§2701.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Emergency Interim Judicial Succession Act."

Acts 1963, No. 112, §1.
